description.description: Defines a detailed description or metadata for the resource being created.

instances.description: Specifies a list of instance IDs to associate with the resource. Each ID must be a valid string.

name.description: Defines the name of the resource, which is mandatory and cannot be null.

named_port.description: Specifies a list of named port objects, each containing a name (string) and a port number (integer).

network.description: Defines the network to which the resource is attached.

timeouts.description: Configures timeout settings for resource operations, including create, delete, and update actions. Each timeout value can be specified as an optional string.

zone.description: Specifies the zone where the resource resides. Must be a valid string if provided.
